title: The Workout Wombats and the Deep Blue Sea
summary: In a world where the deep blue sea meets a rising forest fire, the Workout Wombats prepare for a grand adventure. Clad in their unique gear, they navigate a realm filled with scorpions and monsters lurking in the depths. Under the light of the stars, they dance and sing across a land of unexpected wonders and aquatic dangers.

highlightQuote.text: Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Scorpion, monster, and the... Deep blue sea!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wait, we put in some deep blue sea.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. All right. Here's the stars. Stars are ready. I'm going to turn out the light and then we're going to go in our spot.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Come on, come on over.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm coming.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now I have to put on funny clothes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's a pillowcase, but okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We'll have to put on funny clothing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: For our pretend work out Wombats?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. We all pretend to be someone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Do you see the blue timer anywhere?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know. It must be downstairs.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, may you please set a timer on your phone?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's okay. We don't need a timer. We can just tell a short Stars and Stories story and then we'll be done.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, it's deep blue sea, a forest fire rising up. Deep blue sea, a forest fire rising up. Deep blue sea, a forest fire rising up. Deep blue sea. Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Scorpion, monster, and the... Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea! Deep blue sea!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow. Okay, so I'm going to turn out the light so we can do Stars and Stories. But for Stars and Stories we sit or lie down. So will you come and sit with me please?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But I want to dance!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. We'll keep the light on then so we don't trip on anything because there's a lot on the floor right now.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe if we just took in those, then we can have them. If we took in our toys now, then we would have more...

characters.name: Workout Wombats
characters.description: A group of adventurous animals who don funny clothing to prepare for their missions.

characters.name: Scorpion
characters.description: A creature that dwells within the mysterious blue depths.

characters.name: Monster
characters.description: A large and unknown inhabitant of the sea.

places.name: Deep Blue Sea
places.description: A vast ocean where forest fires rise and strange creatures roam.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.
